scope: Google Search Console only (rankings, impressions, position, CTR derived from 31 daily snapshots 2026-05-07 -> 2026-06-18, joined to the 74-term keyword master). Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual -- GSC/GA4 cannot produce them honestly.
wins: 4 tracked terms hold #1-#3 tiers: 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' at #1 (up from pos 15.8 on 5/07), 'bariatric counseling san antonio' #2, 'weight loss counseling san antonio' #2 (up from 25.3), and 'bariatric surgery counseling' #3.
'bariatric counseling' is the strongest page-1 commercial term by volume: 29 impressions at avg pos 9.8, improving +6.8 positions vs the reference snapshot.

Biggest positive moves this period: 'weight loss therapy' +18.0 to pos 6.0, 'bariatric counselor' +12.3 to pos 4.0, and 'san antonio bariatric center' +15.3 to pos 11.3 (all low-impression, directional).
Top organic landing page 'why-hydration-is-essential-for-weight-loss-and-management' pulled 1,386 impressions at avg pos 5.8 (8 clicks), the single biggest page-1 impression driver on the site.
needs_attention: Coverage is thin: 22 of 74 tracked KEYWORDS (not pages) show GSC impressions this window; 52 show none. This is a KEYWORD count, not a page count -- and most staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages that are already live on www (a tracker-hygiene issue, not lost traffic).

Visibility drifted down across the window: site impressions fell from 2,447 (first snapshot 5/07) to 1,654 (last snapshot 6/18) and impression-weighted avg position slipped from 14.87 to 17.86. Each snapshot is a rolling 7-day window, so treat this as a trend signal, not an exact loss.

CTR is near zero: 7 clicks on 1,654 impressions (~0.4%) in the latest snapshot. High-impression blog posts convert poorly -- 'understanding-weight-loss-medications...' has 1,107 impressions at pos 9.6 but 0 clicks.
Commercial terms that slipped with real impressions: 'weight loss counseling or therapy' -6.3 to pos 10.0 (imp 5) and 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' -2.2 to pos 13.1 (imp 13).
CAVEAT: many tracked positions rest on 1-5 impressions and swing day to day; single-impression positions are directional only, not stable rankings.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene: 7 of the 49 distinct target pages in keywords-master still point at staging12 URLs (e.g. san-antonio-bariatric-center, what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor, bariatric-counseling-near-me). A staging targetUrl does NOT mean the page is unpublished -- repoint any that are already live on www so GSC can match them, and confirm the genuine staging->prod push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes rather than inferring a count from this data.

Fix CTR on high-impression blog posts: add clear CTAs and internal links from 'why-hydration...' (1,386 imp), 'understanding-weight-loss-medications...' (1,107 imp, 0 clicks), and 'how-to-improve-self-esteem...' (827 imp) into the matching service pages, and refresh their titles/meta descriptions.
On-page refresh for the slipped terms 'weight loss counseling or therapy' (pos 10.0, -6.3) and 'eating disorder therapist san antonio' (pos 13.1, -2.2, 13 imp) to defend page-1/near-page-1 footing.

Defend the core local money terms now holding #1-#3 ('bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' #1, 'bariatric counseling san antonio' #2) with fresh internal links and review signals before competitors reclaim them.
Add/verify FAQ schema on the top service and blog pages to stay eligible for rich results and AI-overview citations.
summary: GSC coverage is 22 of 74 tracked keywords with data (a keyword count, not a page count) and overall visibility drifted down (impressions 2,447->1,654, avg pos 14.87->17.86 across the window), but core local terms are strong -- 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' now ranks #1 and four terms sit in #1-#3. The biggest leverage is CTR: high-impression blog posts pull thousands of impressions at page-1 positions yet convert near 0%, so internal links/CTAs and tracker-URL hygiene are the top moves.
